meta.description: Playable species for hero creation. Each species defines starting Characteristics, wound/strain base thresholds, speed, and mechanical abilities. Total characteristic points = 12 for all organic species.

human.name: Human

abilities.name: Adaptable
abilities.description: Recover 1 additional strain during Rest actions. Humans are versatile and recover composure quickly.

human.description: Versatile and adaptable. Humans are the most common species in the galaxy.

twilek.name: Twi'lek

abilities.name: Beguiling
abilities.description: Upgrade attack pool once when making social skill checks. Natural charm and lekku body language give Twi'leks an edge in negotiations.

twilek.description: Charismatic and resilient. Twi'leks are natural leaders and negotiators.

wookiee.name: Wookiee

abilities.name: Wookiee Rage
abilities.description: +1 damage on melee/Brawl attacks when wounded. The legendary Wookiee berserker fury makes them more dangerous as they take damage.

abilities.name: Intimidating
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Wookiees do not break -- they break others.

wookiee.description: Powerful and loyal. Wookiees are fearsome warriors with an unbreakable honor code.

rodian.name: Rodian

abilities.name: Expert Tracker
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Born hunters, Rodians have an innate sense for lining up the perfect shot.

rodian.description: Quick and perceptive. Rodians are born hunters with excellent reflexes.

trandoshan.name: Trandoshan

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.description: Recover 1 wound at the start of each activation (if wounded). Trandoshans can regrow lost limbs over time; in combat, minor wounds close rapidly.

trandoshan.description: Brutal and relentless. Trandoshans worship the Scorekeeper and live for the hunt.

bothan.name: Bothan

abilities.name: Convincing Demeanor
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Deception and Streetwise checks. Many Bothans died to bring us this information -- but these ones are very good at not dying.

bothan.description: Shrewd and resourceful. Bothans are master spies and information brokers.

droid.name: Droid

abilities.name: Inorganic
abilities.description: Immune to Poison and Fear conditions. Droids lack biological vulnerabilities but cannot benefit from stimpacks (use repair patches instead).

abilities.name: Enduring Chassis
abilities.description: +1 soak from reinforced plating. Droids are built to take punishment.

droid.description: Immune to Poison and Fear. Droids are built for purpose with reinforced chassis plating.

gand.name: Gand

abilities.name: Ammonia Breathers
abilities.description: Immune to Poison condition. Gand breathe ammonia and are unaffected by toxins and gases designed for oxygen-breathing species.

abilities.name: Ultraviolet Vision
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Gand compound eyes perceive ultraviolet light.

gand.description: Mystical insectoid bounty hunters from the ammonia-shrouded world of Gand. Renowned as findsmen who track quarry across the galaxy.

duros.name: Duros

abilities.name: Intuitive Navigation
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception and Vigilance checks. Duros have an innate spatial awareness honed over millennia of spacefaring.

duros.description: Natural spacefarers and explorers. Duros were among the first species to develop hyperspace travel and have an innate talent for navigation.

gran.name: Gran

abilities.name: Enhanced Vision
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Gran have three eyes providing exceptional depth perception and targeting ability.

gran.description: Communal three-eyed species from Kinyen. Gran form deep emotional bonds and have exceptional depth perception from their three stalked eyes.

ithorian.name: Ithorian

abilities.name: Ithorian Bellow
abilities.description: +1 damage on Brawl attacks. Ithorians can unleash devastating sonic bellows from their twin mouths, usable as a natural weapon in close quarters.

ithorian.description: Peaceful herbivores known as Hammerheads. Ithorians revere nature and maintain ecological balance, but can unleash devastating sonic bellows when threatened.

mon_calamari.name: Mon Calamari

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception checks. Mon Calamari have exceptional aquatic vision that translates to keen battlefield awareness.

mon_calamari.description: Aquatic tacticians and shipbuilders from Dac. Mon Calamari are natural leaders who provided the Rebel Alliance with its most powerful capital ships.

sullustan.name: Sullustan

abilities.name: Dark Vision
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Sullustans evolved in underground caverns and can navigate in total darkness.

abilities.name: Keen Direction Sense
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Survival checks. Sullustans possess an unerring sense of direction and never get lost.

sullustan.description: Underground-dwelling species with exceptional senses and an unerring sense of direction. Sullustans are natural pilots and navigators.

chiss.name: Chiss

abilities.name: Infravision
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Chiss can perceive infrared radiation, allowing them to see heat signatures.

abilities.name: Analytical Mind
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Computers and Vigilance checks. Chiss are renowned for their tactical and analytical brilliance.

chiss.description: Blue-skinned near-humans from the Unknown Regions. Chiss are brilliant strategists and disciplined warriors, exemplified by the legendary Grand Admiral Thrawn.

devaronian.name: Devaronian

abilities.name: Resilient Metabolism
abilities.description: Immune to Poison condition. Devaronians have a hardy metabolism that neutralizes most toxins and poisons.

devaronian.description: Devil-horned wanderers with a deep love of travel and exploration. Male Devaronians roam the galaxy while females tend to stay on Devaron to manage affairs.

falleen.name: Falleen

abilities.name: Beguiling Pheromones
abilities.description: Upgrade attack pool once when making social skill checks. Falleen exude powerful pheromones that make them nearly irresistible in social encounters.

falleen.description: Reptilian near-humans who exude powerful pheromones. Falleen are vain and regal, considering themselves the pinnacle of evolution in the galaxy.

aqualish.name: Aqualish

abilities.name: Tenacious
abilities.description: +1 damage on melee/Brawl attacks when wounded. Aqualish become more aggressive and dangerous when injured.

aqualish.description: Tusked, walrus-faced brutes known for their belligerent temperament. Aqualish are often found working as mercenaries and enforcers across the Outer Rim.

chadra_fan.name: Chadra-Fan

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Chadra-Fan are diminutive creatures, making them difficult targets for ranged attacks.

abilities.name: Natural Tinkerer
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Mechanics checks. Chadra-Fan have an innate talent for understanding and modifying technology.

chadra_fan.description: Tiny bat-like tinkerers with an insatiable curiosity and a natural gift for technology. Chadra-Fan are gregarious and hate being alone.

dug.name: Dug

abilities.name: Acrobatic
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Athletics and Coordination checks. Dugs use their hands as feet and vice versa, giving them remarkable physical dexterity.

dug.description: Aggressive species that walks on their arms and manipulates objects with their legs. Dugs are fierce competitors, as exemplified by the podracer Sebulba.

ewok.name: Ewok

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Ewoks are small and hard to target at range.

abilities.name: Primitive Resourcefulness
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Survival and Stealth checks. Ewoks are masters of guerrilla warfare and living off the land.

ewok.description: Small but fierce forest dwellers from the moon of Endor. Ewoks are resourceful warriors who use primitive technology to devastating effect through guerrilla tactics.

gungan.name: Gungan

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Athletics and Coordination checks. Gungans are amphibious beings equally at home on land and underwater.

gungan.description: Amphibious species from the swamps and underwater cities of Naboo. Gungans are athletic and agile, with a unique plasma-based technology and a proud warrior tradition.

jawa.name: Jawa

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Jawas are diminutive scavengers, difficult to hit at range.

abilities.name: Natural Scavenger
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Mechanics and Skulduggery checks. Jawas have an innate talent for salvaging, repairing, and repurposing technology.

jawa.description: Diminutive hooded scavengers from Tatooine. Jawas roam the desert in massive sandcrawlers, salvaging and trading technology with a keen eye for value.

klatooinian.name: Klatooinian

abilities.name: Ironfisted Loyalty
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Klatooinians have an unshakeable resolve born from generations of servitude and duty.

klatooinian.description: Tough, loyal warriors bound by an ancient pact of servitude to the Hutts. Klatooinians are disciplined fighters who take pride in their martial traditions.

kyuzo.name: Kyuzo

abilities.name: War Shield Mastery
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Coordination checks. Kyuzo are supremely athletic, capable of incredible acrobatic feats in combat.

abilities.name: Quick Reflexes
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Kyuzo have lightning-fast reflexes honed by their high-gravity homeworld.

kyuzo.description: Athletic warriors from the high-gravity world of Phatrong. Kyuzo are known for their incredible agility and signature war shields that double as thrown weapons.

nikto.name: Nikto

abilities.name: Hardened Skin
abilities.description: +1 soak from thick reptilian hide. Nikto have naturally tough skin that provides modest protection.

nikto.description: Reptilian species from Kintan with five distinct subspecies adapted to different environments. Nikto are tough, hardy survivors often employed as mercenaries and enforcers.

quarren.name: Quarren

abilities.name: Ink Spray
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Deception and Stealth checks. Quarren can spray ink as a distraction, and their tentacle-face gives nothing away.

quarren.description: Tentacle-faced aquatic species from Mon Cala. Quarren are shrewd negotiators and pragmatic realists who share their homeworld with the Mon Calamari.

toydarian.name: Toydarian

abilities.name: Force Resistance
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Toydarians have an unusual resistance to mental manipulation and Force-based influence.

abilities.name: Natural Haggler
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Negotiation checks. Toydarians are born dealmakers and shrewd traders.

toydarian.description: Winged traders and dealmakers known for their resistance to Force-based mental tricks. Toydarians are shrewd negotiators who hover on rapidly beating wings.

weequay.name: Weequay

abilities.name: Leathery Hide
abilities.description: +1 soak from thick, weather-beaten skin. Weequay are naturally tough and resistant to environmental hazards.

weequay.description: Tough, leathery-skinned mercenaries from the arid world of Sriluur. Weequay are commonly found working as pirates, bounty hunters, and muscle for hire across the galaxy.

arcona.name: Arcona

abilities.name: Keen Senses
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception checks. Arcona have a keen sense of smell through their sensitive nostrils and can detect trace chemicals in the environment.

abilities.name: Thermal Vision
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Arcona perceive heat signatures through their bulbous eyes.

arcona.description: Serpentine-headed species with large, multifaceted eyes. Arcona are communal beings who form tight-knit family groups and possess keen thermal vision.

clawdite.name: Clawdite

abilities.name: Changeling
abilities.description: Upgrade attack pool once when making social skill checks. Clawdites are shapeshifters who can alter their appearance to mimic other humanoid species.

clawdite.description: Shape-shifting reptilian species capable of altering their appearance. Clawdites are often employed as spies, assassins, and infiltrators due to their natural disguise ability.

cerean.name: Cerean

abilities.name: Binary Processing
abilities.description: Recover 1 additional strain during Rest actions. Cereans have a binary brain that processes information in parallel, allowing faster mental recovery.

cerean.description: Tall beings with enlarged craniums housing binary brains. Cereans are renowned philosophers and thinkers who can process multiple trains of thought simultaneously.

kel_dor.name: Kel Dor

abilities.name: Dark Vision
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Kel Dor perceive a wide spectrum of light through their specialized eye structures.

abilities.name: Force Attuned
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Discipline checks. Kel Dor have a natural sensitivity to the Force and strong mental discipline.

kel_dor.description: Masked beings from Dorin who breathe a unique helium-based atmosphere. Kel Dor are known for their strong moral compass and many have served as Jedi, including Plo Koon.

mirialan.name: Mirialan

abilities.name: Spiritual Focus
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Discipline and Cool checks. Mirialans practice deep spiritual traditions focused on self-mastery and fate.

mirialan.description: Disciplined near-humans with distinctive geometric tattoos marking their accomplishments. Mirialans believe strongly in fate and self-improvement, producing many notable Jedi.

nautolan.name: Nautolan

abilities.name: Pheromone Detection
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception and Charm checks. Nautolans sense emotions through pheromones via their head-tresses, giving them an empathic edge.

nautolan.description: Amphibious species with distinctive head-tresses that detect pheromones and emotions. Nautolans are empathic beings, exemplified by Jedi Master Kit Fisto.

togruta.name: Togruta

abilities.name: Pack Instincts
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception and Vigilance checks. Togruta montrals provide passive echolocation, enhancing spatial awareness in combat.

togruta.description: Colorful beings with distinctive montrals and head-tails that provide passive echolocation. Togruta are natural pack hunters, with Ahsoka Tano as their most famous representative.

zabrak.name: Zabrak

abilities.name: Fearsome Countenance
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Zabrak have iron willpower and refuse to show weakness, often intimidating opponents with their horned visage.

zabrak.description: Fierce horned warriors known for their iron determination and facial tattoos. Zabrak are independent-minded and refuse to be broken, with both Jedi and Sith among their ranks.

iktotchi.name: Iktotchi

abilities.name: Precognitive Instincts
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Vigilance checks. Iktotchi have a limited precognitive ability that gives them flashes of danger before it strikes.

iktotchi.description: Horned species from the windswept moon of Iktotch. Iktotchi possess a natural precognitive sense that makes them exceptional pilots and difficult to surprise in combat.

aleena.name: Aleena

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Aleena are small and extremely quick, making them difficult targets.

aleena.description: Tiny, quick-moving reptilians with a cheerful disposition. Aleena are swift runners despite their small stature, often surprising larger opponents with their speed and agility.

dowutin.name: Dowutin

abilities.name: Massive Frame
abilities.description: +1 soak from thick hide and dense musculature. Dowutin are enormous beings whose sheer mass provides natural protection.

abilities.name: Unstoppable
abilities.description: +1 damage on melee/Brawl attacks when wounded. Dowutin become increasingly ferocious when injured.

dowutin.description: Massive, thick-skinned brutes from a high-gravity world. Dowutin are among the largest playable species and rely on brute strength and natural toughness in combat.

kaleesh.name: Kaleesh

abilities.name: Warrior Culture
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Kaleesh are born warriors with an instinct for combat honed through generations of tribal warfare.

kaleesh.description: Fierce masked warriors from Kalee with a proud martial tradition. Kaleesh are renowned throughout the galaxy for their combat prowess. General Grievous was a Kaleesh before his cybernetic transformation.

mikkian.name: Mikkian

abilities.name: Sensory Head-Tendrils
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception checks. Mikkian head-tendrils detect subtle vibrations and environmental changes, enhancing spatial awareness.

mikkian.description: Colorful near-humans with distinctive sensory head-tendrils. Mikkians have keen environmental awareness and have served in many roles across the galaxy, including as Jedi.

cosian.name: Cosian

abilities.name: Ancient Wisdom
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Discipline and Medicine checks. Cosians are long-lived scholars with deep wells of knowledge and patience.

cosian.description: Long-lived reptilian scholars with tails and gentle dispositions. Cosians value knowledge and learning, often serving as teachers and historians. Jedi Master Tera Sinube was a Cosian.

bardottan.name: Bardottan

abilities.name: Mystic Attunement
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Discipline and Cool checks. Bardottans have a deep spiritual tradition and natural sensitivity to the Living Force.

bardottan.description: Mystical reptilian species with a deep connection to the Living Force. Bardottans practice an ancient spiritual tradition and are known for their meditative calm and wisdom.

pantoran.name: Pantoran

abilities.name: Cold Adaptation
abilities.description: Recover 1 additional strain during Rest actions. Pantorans evolved in harsh cold environments, developing exceptional endurance and composure.

pantoran.description: Blue-skinned near-humans from the frigid moon of Pantora. Pantorans are skilled diplomats and politicians who have navigated complex galactic politics for centuries.

lasat.name: Lasat

abilities.name: Bo-rifle Training
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on the first attack each activation. Lasat are trained warriors with an instinct for the opening strike.

abilities.name: Powerful Build
abilities.description: +1 damage on Brawl attacks. Lasat are physically imposing with powerful limbs that deliver devastating strikes.

lasat.description: Large, powerful warriors from Lasan with a proud Honor Guard tradition. Lasat are known for their distinctive bo-rifles and physical prowess. Garazeb Orrelios is a famous Lasat rebel.

besalisk.name: Besalisk

abilities.name: Four Arms
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Athletics and Brawl checks. Besalisks have four powerful arms, granting them remarkable versatility in physical tasks and close combat.

besalisk.description: Massive four-armed beings from Ojom. Besalisks are strong and imposing, often working as laborers, fighters, or restaurateurs. Jedi Master Pong Krell was a Besalisk.

gamorrean.name: Gamorrean

abilities.name: Tusked Gore
abilities.description: +1 damage on Brawl attacks. Gamorreans can use their prominent tusks as natural weapons in close combat.

abilities.name: Pig Iron
abilities.description: +1 soak from thick hide and dense muscle. Gamorreans are remarkably tough and can absorb punishment that would fell other species.

gamorrean.description: Porcine warriors from Gamorr with a culture built entirely around combat. Gamorreans are commonly employed as guards and enforcers throughout the galaxy.

geonosian.name: Geonosian

abilities.name: Winged
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Coordination checks. Geonosians have wings that allow short bursts of flight, granting superior mobility and positioning.

geonosian.description: Insectoid species from Geonosis with a rigid caste-based hive society. Geonosians are skilled engineers who designed the Death Star and can fly short distances on their chitinous wings.

neimoidian.name: Neimoidian

abilities.name: Trade Federation Training
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Negotiation and Deception checks. Neimoidians are raised in cutthroat competition and become natural schemers and dealmakers.

neimoidian.description: Shrewd and cowardly reptilians who controlled the Trade Federation. Neimoidians are raised in a fiercely competitive environment that produces cunning negotiators and bureaucrats.

pau_an.name: Pau'an

abilities.name: Long-Lived Wisdom
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Discipline and Leadership checks. Pau'ans live for centuries, accumulating vast experience and commanding natural authority.

pau_an.description: Tall, gaunt beings from Utapau with lifespans of centuries. Pau'ans are natural administrators and leaders, known for their deep-set eyes, lined faces, and sharp teeth. The Grand Inquisitor was a Pau'an.

umbaran.name: Umbaran

abilities.name: Shadow Dweller
abilities.description: Can see in darkness without penalty. Umbarans evolved on a world of perpetual shadow and can see clearly in near-total darkness.

abilities.name: Subtle Influence
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Deception checks. Umbarans are natural manipulators who excel at misdirection and subtle control.

umbaran.description: Pale, ghostly beings from the shadowy world of Umbara. Umbarans are master manipulators and possess advanced technology. They can see in ultraviolet and are notoriously untrustworthy.

selkath.name: Selkath

abilities.name: Natural Healer
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Medicine checks. Selkath have an innate understanding of biology and healing, tied to their reverence for the kolto of their homeworld.

selkath.description: Aquatic species from Manaan, guardians of the galaxy's kolto supply. Selkath are natural healers and diplomats who fiercely protect the neutrality of their ocean homeworld.

kalleran.name: Kalleran

abilities.name: Lightning Reflexes
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Coordination and Vigilance checks. Kallerans have exceptionally fast neural pathways, giving them remarkable reaction times.

kalleran.description: Quick-reflexed species known for their exceptional reaction times. Kallerans are athletic and perceptive, with some showing Force sensitivity. Depa Billaba's padawan Caleb Dume had close ties to Kalleran freedom fighters.

gotal.name: Gotal

abilities.name: Electromagnetic Sensors
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception and Vigilance checks. Gotal head cones detect electromagnetic fields and emotions, making them nearly impossible to ambush.

gotal.description: Horned beings whose cranial cones detect electromagnetic radiation and emotions. Gotals are natural empaths who find droids extremely unsettling due to their dissonant electromagnetic signatures.

shistavanen.name: Shistavanen

abilities.name: Predatory Instincts
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Perception and Survival checks. Shistavanen are apex predators with exceptional senses of smell and hearing.

shistavanen.description: Lupine predators from Uvena Prime with keen senses and natural hunting instincts. Shistavanen are solitary by nature and make exceptional scouts, trackers, and bounty hunters.

talz.name: Talz

abilities.name: Arctic Adaptation
abilities.description: Recover 1 additional strain during Rest actions. Talz are adapted to extreme cold environments, granting them remarkable endurance and hardiness.

talz.description: Large, gentle, four-eyed beings covered in thick white fur. Talz are peaceful by nature but formidable in combat due to their size and strength. They are adapted to extreme cold environments.

xexto.name: Xexto

abilities.name: Extra Limbs
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Coordination checks. Xexto have six limbs that provide extraordinary dexterity and the ability to manipulate multiple objects simultaneously.

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Xexto are small and extremely nimble, making them difficult targets.

xexto.description: Six-limbed aliens from Troiken known for their incredible dexterity. Xexto can use all their limbs independently and are among the most agile species in the galaxy. The podracer Gasgano was a Xexto.

gossam.name: Gossam

abilities.name: Corporate Efficiency
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Negotiation and Computers checks. Gossam are natural bureaucrats and administrators with keen analytical minds.

gossam.description: Small reptilian species who ran the Commerce Guild during the Clone Wars. Gossam are efficient administrators and shrewd businessbeings, though they tend toward cowardice when physically threatened.

muun.name: Muun

abilities.name: Mathematical Precision
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Computers and Mechanics checks. Muuns have an innate mathematical genius that makes them natural bankers and engineers.

muun.description: Tall, thin-bodied bankers from Scipio who controlled the InterGalactic Banking Clan. Muuns are mathematical geniuses with an obsessive focus on profit. Darth Plagueis was a Muun.

skakoan.name: Skakoan

abilities.name: Pressure Suit
abilities.description: Immune to Poison condition. Skakoans wear pressure suits that protect them from most atmospheric contaminants and toxins.

abilities.name: Technological Aptitude
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Computers checks. Skakoans are brilliant technologists who led the Techno Union.

skakoan.description: Methane-breathing technologists who require pressure suits in standard atmospheres. Skakoans led the Techno Union and are brilliant engineers and scientists.

lannik.name: Lannik

abilities.name: Indomitable Will
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Lannik are famously stubborn and courageous, refusing to back down regardless of odds.

lannik.description: Small but fierce warriors with large pointed ears. Lannik are renowned for their bravery and stubbornness far out of proportion to their diminutive stature. Jedi Master Even Piell was a Lannik.

dressellian.name: Dressellian

abilities.name: Guerrilla Fighter
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Stealth and Survival checks. Dressellians waged a long guerrilla war against the Empire, honing their ability to strike from hiding.

dressellian.description: Wrinkle-faced freedom fighters who waged a long guerrilla campaign against the Empire. Dressellians are resourceful and determined, specializing in asymmetric warfare and ambush tactics.

cathar.name: Cathar

abilities.name: Retractable Claws
abilities.description: +1 damage on Brawl attacks. Cathar have sharp retractable claws that serve as natural weapons in close combat.

cathar.description: Feline warriors from a world devastated by the Mandalorians. Cathar are proud, passionate, and fiercely loyal. Their retractable claws make them dangerous in close quarters combat.

sathari.name: Sathari

abilities.name: Graceful Presence
abilities.description: Upgrade attack pool once when making social skill checks. Sathari are graceful beings with an almost ethereal beauty and natural diplomatic skill.

sathari.description: Avian species with vestigial wings and an elegant, graceful bearing. Sathari are natural diplomats and mediators, known for their calm demeanor and persuasive voices.

kaminoan.name: Kaminoan

abilities.name: Master Geneticists
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Medicine checks. Kaminoans are brilliant biologists and geneticists who created the clone army of the Republic.

kaminoan.description: Tall, slender amphibians from the ocean world of Kamino. Kaminoans are reclusive scientists renowned for their mastery of cloning and genetic engineering, creators of the Grand Army of the Republic.

drall.name: Drall

abilities.name: Scholarly Tradition
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Computers and Medicine checks. Drall are devoted scholars with a deep intellectual tradition spanning millennia.

abilities.name: Silhouette 0
abilities.description: +1 ranged defense. Drall are small, stocky beings that are difficult to target at range.

drall.description: Small, furry scholars from the Corellian system. Drall are deeply intellectual beings with a scholarly tradition that rivals the great academic institutions of the Core Worlds.

selonian.name: Selonian

abilities.name: Natural Tunneler
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Athletics and Stealth checks. Selonians are burrowing creatures with powerful limbs and an innate sense for subterranean navigation.

selonian.description: Weasel-like tunnel dwellers from the Corellian system. Selonians are agile and communal, living in vast underground warrens. They are fiercely protective of their dens and highly loyal to their clans.

anx.name: Anx

abilities.name: Towering Presence
abilities.description: +1 Ability die on Leadership and Coercion checks. Anx tower over most other species, commanding attention and respect through sheer physical presence.

anx.description: Massive, crested saurian beings that tower over most other species. Anx are deliberate and thoughtful despite their imposing size, and they communicate partly through color changes in their crests.

chevin.name: Chevin

abilities.name: Thick Hide
abilities.description: +1 soak from thick, pachydermal skin. Chevin have remarkably tough hide that absorbs impacts.

chevin.description: Large, pachydermal beings with elongated snouts. Chevin are shrewd businessbeings and slavers known for their physical toughness and ruthless pragmatism in all dealings.

dathomirian.name: Dathomirian Zabrak

abilities.name: Dark Fury
abilities.description: +1 damage on melee/Brawl attacks when wounded. Dathomirian Zabrak draw upon deep wells of pain and fury, becoming more lethal when injured.

abilities.name: Nightbrother Resolve
abilities.description: Immune to Fear condition. Dathomirians are hardened by the brutal trials of their homeworld and know no fear.

dathomirian.description: Zabrak subspecies from Dathomir, shaped by dark side Force traditions. Dathomirian Zabrak are fierce warriors, with Darth Maul and Savage Opress as their most infamous representatives.
